name: mini_side_scroller
description: Machine-readable behavior contract derived from golden traces. Any port (Rust, etc.) must satisfy these scenarios and invariants exactly.

no_jumps.notes: No input - should run to max_ticks without collision, max score.

collision_first.notes: Must collide on the first obstacle at tick 9.

invariants: score increases by exactly 1 per tick only while not collided
collision uses tolerance 0.6 on x-distance and y-range check against obstacles
after first collision, collided remains true and score stops increasing
trace records are rounded to 4 decimal places for x/y/vy (matching simulator)
source: examples/mini_game/tests/golden_*.json generated by deterministic Python simulator
